title: CL_Invocation.ps1

CL_Invocation.ps1

Aero diagnostics script

Execute

Proxy execution

. C:\Windows\diagnostics\system\AERO\CL_Invocation.ps1   \nSyncInvoke {CMD}

Import the PowerShell Diagnostic CL_Invocation script and call SyncInvoke to launch an executable. — MITRE: T1216 — Privileges: User
